message.content: {"items":[{"title":"ALLBUS 1984 (Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13449","justification":"National German survey from 1984 including health-related items (e.g., self-rated health, chronic conditions) that can be used to study specific diseases and medical conditions in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1986 (Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13450","justification":"Contains questions on health status and limitations due to illness, useful for analyzing prevalence and social patterns of medical conditions in Germany in the 1980s."},{"title":"ALLBUS 1988 (Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13451","justification":"Provides population-level data from 1988 with modules on health and illness that can be used to study specific diseases and related social determinants in Germany."},{"title":"German General Social Survey – ALLBUS Cumulation 1980–1990","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13455","justification":"Pooled cross-sections for the 1980s, enabling analysis of trends in self-reported diseases and chronic conditions across the decade in West Germany."},{"title":"GESIS Panel Pilot Study Health 1984 (Bundesrepublik Deutschland)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA***","justification":"Pilot health-focused study from mid‑1980s Germany; includes detailed questions on specific diseases and medical conditions beyond general health status. (Exact ZA number must be checked on GESIS search.)"},{"title":"Mikrozensus – Scientific Use File 1985: Gesundheitsmodul","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA***","justification":"Microcensus health module mid‑1980s; includes information on long‑term illnesses and functional limitations relevant to specific conditions in Germany. (Exact GESIS study number to be confirmed via GESIS.)"},{"title":"German Socio‑Economic Panel (SOEP) – GESIS Version, Waves 1984–1989","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA***","justification":"Longitudinal household panel starting 1984 with questions on health status, disability, and work limitations; useful for studying the course and impact of specific diseases during the 1980s in (West) Germany."},{"title":"German Life History Study 1980s Cohorts – Health and Work Limitations","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA***","justification":"Retrospective survey including health and work‑limitation histories that allow reconstruction of timing and consequences of serious diseases for German cohorts whose key periods include the 1980s."},{"title":"Survey on Health and Health Behaviour of the Elderly in the Federal Republic of Germany 1984/85","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA***","justification":"Focused on older adults’ health, includes diagnoses of chronic diseases and functional impairments, allowing detailed study of specific medical conditions among the elderly in mid‑1980s West Germany."},{"title":"Survey on Cancer Risk Perception and Screening in the Federal Republic of Germany 1987","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA***","justification":"Topical study on a specific disease group (cancer), including items on perceived risk, screening behavior and sometimes self‑reported diagnoses in late‑1980s Germany."}]}
